name: vgrand-crm-backend
description: V Grand Hotel CRM Backend - Node.js + Express + Sequelize + PostgreSQL

scripts.postinstall: node -e "try { require('child_process').execSync('npx --yes puppeteer browsers install chrome', { stdio: 'inherit' }); } catch (e) { console.warn('Skipping puppeteer chrome install:', e.message); }"
